title: agrostis canina var. nivea
intro: Agrostis canina var. nivea, also known as White Canary Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Agrostis canina var. nivea include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Agrostis canina var. nivea often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
